use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers or settings menus
Show user avatars in comment sections or discussion threads
Display team member avatars in organizational charts or dashboards
Show user status indicators in messaging or collaboration tools
Render placeholder avatars with initials for users without profile images
ai_summary: A composite Avatar component system built with Radix UI primitives and class-variance-authority. Supports multiple sub-components including Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, AvatarIndicator, and AvatarStatus with variants for online/offline/busy/away states. Designed for displaying user identity information in various contexts with proper accessibility and fallback handling.
